allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add project design documentation

- Add comprehensive design specs \(PRD, APP_FLOW, TECH_STACK, FRONTEND_GUIDELINES, BACKEND_STRUCTURE, IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN\)
- Add design document in specs directory
- Add CLAUDE.md for future development guidance
- Add PROGRESS.md for tracking progress and lessons learned

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-25-stage1-initialization.md && git commit -m "docs: fix Stage 1 plan based on code review feedback

- Add Task 6: Custom exception classes \(WealthException, DataFetchException, etc.\)
- Add Task 7: CacheManager class with file-based caching
- Fix Task 3: Update file structure to include exceptions.py and cache.py
- Fix Task 10: Add proper imports to all placeholder modules
- Fix Task 10: Add complete method signatures matching spec
- Fix Task 9: Add missing idx_sectors_type index
- Fix Task 1: Add tests directory creation
- Update task numbering \(now 12 tasks instead of 10\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")
